props.name: 清明白册
props.design_rules: Use 清明白册 as episode 01 art reference. 白册页角、浮字后期文字位、结尾合册参考。 Preserve PROP_QINGMING_REGISTER;RULE_BLOODLINE_TEXT_READABLE. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 白册页角、浮字后期文字位、结尾合册参考。

props.name: 虫蜡针/清明香/清明工具板
props.design_rules: Use 虫蜡针/清明香/清明工具板 as episode 01 art reference. 虫蜡针、香线、针盘、封条参考。 Preserve PROP_INSECT_WAX_NEEDLE;PROP_QINGMING_INCENSE. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 虫蜡针、香线、针盘、封条参考。

props.name: 旧驿图/残缺大陆驿道图
props.design_rules: Use 旧驿图/残缺大陆驿道图 as episode 01 art reference. 序幕南方密室旧驿图和药包遮蔽参考。 Preserve PROP_OLD_RELAY_MAP;FACTION_ZHAOMING_RELIC. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 序幕南方密室旧驿图和药包遮蔽参考。

props.name: 半枚日月驿令/一线月白反光规则
props.design_rules: Use 半枚日月驿令/一线月白反光规则 as episode 01 art reference. 第一集只作井沿一线月白反光参考，不展示全貌。 Preserve RULE_MOON_WHITE_GLINT_ONLY;RULE_NO_MOON_JADE_FULL_REVEAL. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 第一集只作井沿一线月白反光参考，不展示全貌。

props.name: 沈照眠小草药袋/药名牌
props.design_rules: Use 沈照眠小草药袋/药名牌 as episode 01 art reference. 小草药袋、空白药名牌、烧焦发绳参考。 Preserve PROP_HERB_POUCH;PROP_HERB_NAME_TILES. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 小草药袋、空白药名牌、烧焦发绳参考。

post_text_layer_rules.rule: 图像资产只提供留白、纸张、木牌、药牌、地图和封条材质；所有可读文字由 Prompt Room 或后期文字层精确叠加，不交给图像/视频模型生成。
